data.content:
This is an **xUnit v3** project on **Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP)**. Use this command:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ShoppingCartTests"
```

This filters to only tests whose fully qualified name contains `ShoppingCartTests`, excluding `InventoryServiceTests`.
